Part.Source:
Event Start
&CteIndRec = IndicaRecebedor.Nao
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData'
&CteIndRec.TooltipText = "Indicador se o recebedor retira no aeroporto, filial, porto ou estação de destino? " &CteDadAdiSer.TooltipText = "Texto livre: ENTREGA EXPRESSA; LOGÍSTICA REVERSA; CONVENCIONAL;EMERGENCIAL; etc " &CteDadAdiTra.TooltipText = "Texto livre: REENTREGA; DEVOLUÇÃO;REFATURAMENTO; etc "
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' &SolCod.Visible = False &OldCteExpCod.Visible = False &OldCteRecCod.Visible = False &OldCteTomCod.Visible = False &OldCteDesCod.Visible = False &OldCteIniUfe.Visible = False &OldCteRemCod.Visible = False
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Enter
If 1 = 2
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do 'CheckRequiredFields' If &CheckRequiredFieldsResult AND not &HasValidationErrors Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' WPCte(!'Geral', !'Carga', false) EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Else
Do 'CheckRequiredFields' If &CheckRequiredFieldsResult AND not &HasValidationErrors ValidaDadosGeral.Call(&EmpCod,&CteRemCod,&CteDesCod,&CteLctCod,&IsErro) If &IsErro = false Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' If &IsOk = True WPCte(!'Geral', !'Carga', false) EndIf EndIf EndIf EndIF
EndEvent
Event 'WizardPrevious'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
WPCte(!'Geral', !'Capa', true)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoNovoExp'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
WpNovaPessoa.PopUp('CLI', &CteExpCod, '')
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoNovoRec'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
WpNovaPessoa.PopUp('CLI', &CteRecCod, '')
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoNovoTomSer'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
WpNovaPessoa.PopUp('CLI', &SerCteTomCod, '')
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoNovoTom'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
WpNovaPessoa.PopUp('CLI', &CteTomCod, '')
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoNovoDes'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
WpNovaPessoa.PopUp('CLI', &CteDesCod, '')
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoNovo'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
WpNovaPessoa.PopUp('CLI', &CteRemCod, '')
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Sub 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData'
If 1=2
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &CteCod = &WizardData.Geral.CteCod &CteNum = &WizardData.Geral.CteNum &CteSer = &WizardData.Geral.CteSer &CteAutNumLot = &WizardData.Geral.CteAutNumLot &CteAutDatHorRec = &WizardData.Geral.CteAutDatHorRec &CteAutDigVal = &WizardData.Geral.CteAutDigVal &CteAutNumPro = &WizardData.Geral.CteAutNumPro &CteAutNumRec = &WizardData.Geral.CteAutNumRec &CteAutMsg = &WizardData.Geral.CteAutMsg &CteChv = &WizardData.Geral.CteChv &CteIndRec = &WizardData.Geral.CteIndRec &CteIndRecDes = &WizardData.Geral.CteIndRecDes &SolCod = &WizardData.Geral.SolCod &CteObsAut = &WizardData.Geral.CteObsAut &CteDadAdiTra = &WizardData.Geral.CteDadAdiTra &CteDadAdiSer = &WizardData.Geral.CteDadAdiSer &CteEmiFunCod = &WizardData.Geral.CteEmiFunCod &CteNcmCod = &WizardData.Geral.CteNcmCod &CteNcmDes = &WizardData.Geral.CteNcmDes &CteMod = &WizardData.Geral.CteMod &CteExpCod = &WizardData.Geral.CteExpCod &OldCteExpCod = &WizardData.Geral.OldCteExpCod &CteExpRaz = &WizardData.Geral.CteExpRaz &CteRecCod = &WizardData.Geral.CteRecCod &OldCteRecCod = &WizardData.Geral.OldCteRecCod &CteRecRaz = &WizardData.Geral.CteRecRaz &EmpCod = &WizardData.Geral.EmpCod &SerCteIniCidCod = &WizardData.Geral.SerCteIniCidCod &SerCteTomNom = &WizardData.Geral.SerCteTomNom &SerCteTerCidCod = &WizardData.Geral.SerCteTerCidCod &SerCteTerUfe = &WizardData.Geral.SerCteTerUfe &SerCteTomCod = &WizardData.Geral.SerCteTomCod &SerCteIniUfe = &WizardData.Geral.SerCteIniUfe &CteRemRaz = &WizardData.Geral.CteRemRaz &CteIniCidCod = &WizardData.Geral.CteIniCidCod &CteDesRaz = &WizardData.Geral.CteDesRaz &CteTerCidCod = &WizardData.Geral.CteTerCidCod &CteTomRaz = &WizardData.Geral.CteTomRaz &CteTomCod = &WizardData.Geral.CteTomCod &OldCteTomCod = &WizardData.Geral.OldCteTomCod &CteTomIndAlt = &WizardData.Geral.CteTomIndAlt &CteTomSer = &WizardData.Geral.CteTomSer &CteTerUfe = &WizardData.Geral.CteTerUfe &CteDesCod = &WizardData.Geral.CteDesCod &OldCteDesCod = &WizardData.Geral.OldCteDesCod &CteIniUfe = &WizardData.Geral.CteIniUfe &OldCteIniUfe = &WizardData.Geral.OldCteIniUfe &CteRemCod = &WizardData.Geral.CteRemCod &OldCteRemCod = &WizardData.Geral.OldCteRemCod &FilCod = &WizardData.Geral.FilCod &CteindGlo = &WizardData.Geral.CteindGlo &CteTipSer = &WizardData.Geral.CteTipSer &CteFinEms = &WizardData.Geral.CteFinEms &CteLctCod = &WizardData.Geral.CteLctCod &CteModCod = &WizardData.Geral.CteModCod &CteHorEms = &WizardData.Geral.CteHorEms &CteDtaEms = &WizardData.Geral.CteDtaEms
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Else &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &EmpCod = &WizardData.Geral.EmpCod &FilCod = &WizardData.Geral.FilCod &CteCod = &WizardData.Geral.CteCod
If &CteCod <> 0 Do 'LoadCTe' Do 'servico' Else LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &CteNum = 0 padraoUsuarioHora.Call('L', '#CTEMODCOD', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod,&PadObs, &PadDtaMod,ServerNow(),'P') If not &PadObs.Trim().IsEmpty() &CteModCod = substr(trim(&PadObs),1,2) Else &CteModCod = '57' EndiF
&auxCteTipSer = TipoServicoCte.Normal Do 'servico' RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon002_FilialFaturamento, &CfgVlr) &FilCod = val(&CfgVlr) RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon098_LctoCte, &CfgVlr) &CteLctCod = val(&CfgVlr)
If &CteLctCod = 0 RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon019_LctoOrcamento, &CfgVlr) &CteLctCod = val(&CfgVlr) EndIf
RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon073_NbsPadraoCte, &CfgVlr) &CteNcmCod = val(&CfgVlr) &CteSts = Status_NFe.Digitando
&CteDtaEms = ServerDate() &CteHorEms = ServerTime() &CteTomSer = Tomador.Remetente
If &FilCod.IsEmpty() &FilCod = &Context.FilCod EndIF EndIf EndIf
EndSub
Sub 'SaveVariablesToWizardData'
&IsOk = False
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &WizardData.Geral.CteCod = &CteCod &WizardData.Geral.CteNum = &CteNum &WizardData.Geral.CteSer = &CteSer &WizardData.Geral.CteAutNumLot = &CteAutNumLot &WizardData.Geral.CteAutDatHorRec = &CteAutDatHorRec &WizardData.Geral.CteAutDigVal = &CteAutDigVal &WizardData.Geral.CteAutNumPro = &CteAutNumPro &WizardData.Geral.CteAutNumRec = &CteAutNumRec &WizardData.Geral.CteAutMsg = &CteAutMsg &WizardData.Geral.CteChv = &CteChv &WizardData.Geral.CteIndRec = &CteIndRec &WizardData.Geral.CteIndRecDes = &CteIndRecDes &WizardData.Geral.SolCod = &SolCod &WizardData.Geral.CteObsAut = &CteObsAut &WizardData.Geral.CteDadAdiTra = &CteDadAdiTra &WizardData.Geral.CteDadAdiSer = &CteDadAdiSer &WizardData.Geral.CteEmiFunCod = &CteEmiFunCod &WizardData.Geral.CteNcmCod = &CteNcmCod &WizardData.Geral.CteNcmDes = &CteNcmDes &WizardData.Geral.CteMod = &CteMod &WizardData.Geral.CteExpCod = &CteExpCod &WizardData.Geral.OldCteExpCod = &OldCteExpCod &WizardData.Geral.CteExpRaz = &CteExpRaz &WizardData.Geral.CteRecCod = &CteRecCod &WizardData.Geral.OldCteRecCod = &OldCteRecCod &WizardData.Geral.CteRecRaz = &CteRecRaz &WizardData.Geral.EmpCod = &EmpCod &WizardData.Geral.SerCteIniCidCod = &SerCteIniCidCod &WizardData.Geral.SerCteTomNom = &SerCteTomNom &WizardData.Geral.SerCteTerCidCod = &SerCteTerCidCod &WizardData.Geral.SerCteTerUfe = &SerCteTerUfe &WizardData.Geral.SerCteTomCod = &SerCteTomCod &WizardData.Geral.SerCteIniUfe = &SerCteIniUfe &WizardData.Geral.CteRemRaz = &CteRemRaz &WizardData.Geral.CteIniCidCod = &CteIniCidCod &WizardData.Geral.CteDesRaz = &CteDesRaz &WizardData.Geral.CteTerCidCod = &CteTerCidCod &WizardData.Geral.CteTomRaz = &CteTomRaz &WizardData.Geral.CteTomCod = &CteTomCod &WizardData.Geral.OldCteTomCod = &OldCteTomCod &WizardData.Geral.CteTomIndAlt = &CteTomIndAlt &WizardData.Geral.CteTomSer = &CteTomSer &WizardData.Geral.CteTerUfe = &CteTerUfe &WizardData.Geral.CteDesCod = &CteDesCod &WizardData.Geral.OldCteDesCod = &OldCteDesCod &WizardData.Geral.CteIniUfe = &CteIniUfe &WizardData.Geral.OldCteIniUfe = &OldCteIniUfe &WizardData.Geral.CteRemCod = &CteRemCod &WizardData.Geral.OldCteRemCod = &OldCteRemCod &WizardData.Geral.FilCod = &FilCod &WizardData.Geral.CteindGlo = &CteindGlo &WizardData.Geral.CteTipSer = &CteTipSer &WizardData.Geral.CteFinEms = &CteFinEms &WizardData.Geral.CteLctCod = &CteLctCod &WizardData.Geral.CteModCod = &CteModCod &WizardData.Geral.CteHorEms = &CteHorEms &WizardData.Geral.CteDtaEms = &CteDtaEms &WizardData.Carga.EmpCod = &EmptyWizardData.Carga.EmpCod &WizardData.Carga.AuxCteTomChvAnaOri = &EmptyWizardData.Carga.AuxCteTomChvAnaOri &WizardData.Carga.CteTomChvAnaOri = &EmptyWizardData.Carga.CteTomChvAnaOri &WizardData.Carga.CteTomDtaEmsDec = &EmptyWizardData.Carga.CteTomDtaEmsDec &WizardData.Carga.CteTomChvCpl = &EmptyWizardData.Carga.CteTomChvCpl &WizardData.Carga.M3CteCarQtd = &EmptyWizardData.Carga.M3CteCarQtd &WizardData.Carga.CteCarQtd = &EmptyWizardData.Carga.CteCarQtd &WizardData.Carga.BrtCteDocPes = &EmptyWizardData.Carga.BrtCteDocPes &WizardData.Carga.LiqCteDocPes = &EmptyWizardData.Carga.LiqCteDocPes &WizardData.Carga.CteCarProPre = &EmptyWizardData.Carga.CteCarProPre &WizardData.Carga.CteCarVlrTot = &EmptyWizardData.Carga.CteCarVlrTot &WizardData.Carga.CteCarOtrCar = &EmptyWizardData.Carga.CteCarOtrCar &WizardData.Carga.CteSegApl = &EmptyWizardData.Carga.CteSegApl &WizardData.Carga.CteSegNom = &EmptyWizardData.Carga.CteSegNom &WizardData.Carga.CteSegRef = &EmptyWizardData.Carga.CteSegRef &WizardData.Carga.CteSegCod = &EmptyWizardData.Carga.CteSegCod &WizardData.Carga.CteDocTip = &EmptyWizardData.Carga.CteDocTip &WizardData.Carga.AddCtePerUfeCod = &EmptyWizardData.Carga.AddCtePerUfeCod &WizardData.Carga.CteSerDes = &EmptyWizardData.Carga.CteSerDes &WizardData.Carga.AuxCteCarQtd = &EmptyWizardData.Carga.AuxCteCarQtd &WizardData.Carga.Grid.Clear() &WizardData.Carga.GridPercurso.Clear() &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson())
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
If &CteSts = Status_Nfe.Digitando // só salva se tiver digitando. &NcmAliqTot = 0 Gravacte.Call('GERAL',&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod,&CteRemCod,&CteDesCod,&SerCteTomCod,&CteLctCod,&WizardData,&NcmAliqTot,&CteExpCod,&CteRecCod) &PadObs = trim(&CteModCod) padraoUsuarioHora.Call('G', '#CTEMODCOD', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod,&PadObs, &PadDtaMod,ServerNow(),'P') EndIf &WizardData.Geral.EmpCod = &EmpCod &WizardData.Geral.FilCod = &FilCod &WizardData.Geral.CteCod = &CteCod
&WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson()) &isOk = True
EndSub
Sub 'CheckRequiredFields'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&CheckRequiredFieldsResult = True If &CteDtaEms.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Data'), DVMessageType.error, &CteDtaEms.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &CteLctCod.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Tipo Lcto'), DVMessageType.error, &CteLctCod.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&CteModCod = '57') AND &CteRemCod.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Remetente '), DVMessageType.error, &CteRemCod.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&CteModCod = '57') AND &CteDesCod.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Destinatário'), DVMessageType.error, &CteDesCod.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&CteModCod = '57') AND &CteTomSer.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Responsável Pelo Frete:'), DVMessageType.error, &CteTomSer.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&CteModCod = '67') AND &SerCteTomCod.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Tomador'), DVMessageType.error, &SerCteTomCod.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &CteNcmCod.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Serviço prestado (NBS)'), DVMessageType.error, &CteNcmCod.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
// If &CteFinEms = FinalidadeCte.Anulacao // Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', 'Atenção! Esta finalidade foi desativada pelo sefaz.', DVMessageType.error, &CteFinEms.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) // &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False // EndIf
EndSub
Sub 'AttributesSecurityCode'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If Not (&CteIndRec = IndicaRecebedor.sim) &CteIndRecDes.Visible = False CteIndRecDes_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &CteIndRecDes.Visible = True CteIndRecDes_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell' EndIf If &CteModCod = '67' SerCteTomCod_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 RequiredDataContentCell DscTop' Else SerCteTomCod_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell DscTop' EndIf If &CteModCod = '57' CteTomSer_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 RequiredDataContentCell DscTop' Else CteTomSer_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell DscTop' EndIf If &CteModCod = '57' CteDesCod_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 RequiredDataContentCell DscTop' Else CteDesCod_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell DscTop' EndIf If &CteModCod = '57' CteRemCod_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 RequiredDataContentCell DscTop' Else CteRemCod_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell DscTop' EndIf
IndicaTrocaTomador.Visible = (&CteFinEms = finalidadeCte.Substituicao) TableTom.Visible = (&CteTomSer = '4')
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Event &CteFinEms.IsValid
do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
EndEvent
Event &CteHorEms.IsValid
FormataHora.Call(&CteHorEms, &CteHorEms)
EndEvent
Event &CteModCod.IsValid
Do 'servico'
EndEvent
Event &CteIndRec.Click
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
EndEvent
Event &CteTomSer.IsValid
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' If &CteTomSer = '4' &CteTomCod.SetFocus() Else &CteTomCod = 0 EndIf
EndEvent
Event &CteTomCod.IsValid
If Not &CteTomCod.IsEmpty() Do 'GetTomador' EndIf
EndEvent
Event &SerCteTomCod.IsValid
If Not &SerCteTomCod.IsEmpty() &Sub = 3 Do 'GetCidade' &SerCteTerCidCod.SetFocus() Else &SerCteTomCod.SetFocus() EndIf
EndEvent
Event &CteRecCod.IsValid
Do Case Case not &CteRecCod.IsEmpty() If &CteRecCod <> &OldCteRecCod Do 'GetRecebedor' &Sub = 6 //Recebedor Do 'GetCidade' EndIf Case &CteRecCod.IsEmpty() //se ficou vazio If &CteRecCod <> &OldCteRecCod Do 'GetRecebedor' // então atualiza dados do destinatario &Sub = 2 Do 'GetCidade' Endif OtherWise &CteRecCod.setFocus() EndCase
EndEvent
Event &CteExpCod.IsValid
Do Case Case not &CteExpCod.IsEmpty() // se o expedidor não for vazio If &CteExpCod <> &OldCteExpCod // e trocou expedidor ai atualiza prestação Do 'GetExpedidor' &Sub = 5 //Expedidor Do 'GetCidade' &CteIniCidCod.SetFocus() EndIf
Case &CteExpCod.IsEmpty() //se ficou vazio If &CteExpCod <> &OldCteExpCod Do 'GetExpedidor' // então atualiza dados do remetente &Sub = 1 Do 'GetCidade' Endif OtherWise &CteExpCod.setFocus() EndCase
EndEvent
Event &CteRemCod.IsValid
Do Case Case Not &CteRemCod.IsEmpty() and &CteExpCod.IsEmpty() //Remetente e expedidor é vazio (Insert) If &CteRemCod <> &OldCteRemCod // se trocou Remetente atualiza prestação &Sub = 1 Do 'GetCidade' &CteIniCidCod.SetFocus() EndIf Case &CteRemCod <> &OldCteRemCod and not &CteExpCod.IsEmpty() //trocou o remetente e expedidor não é vazio // então atualiza dados do remetente mas continua prestação do expedidor &Sub = 1 Do 'GetCidade'
&Sub = 5 //Expedidor Do 'GetCidade' &CteIniCidCod.SetFocus()
Case not &CteExpCod.IsEmpty() // se o expedidor não for vazio If &CteExpCod <> &OldCteExpCod // e trocou expedidor ai atualiza prestação &Sub = 5 //Expedidor Do 'GetCidade' &CteIniCidCod.SetFocus() EndIf
OtherWise &CteRemCod.setFocus() EndCase
EndEvent
Event &CteIniUfe.IsValid
If &CteIniUfe <> &OldCteIniUfe &Estado = 1 Do 'CarregaCidades' EndIf
EndEvent
Event &CteTerUfe.IsValid
If &CteTerUfe <> &oldCteTerUfe &Estado = 2 Do 'CarregaCidades' EndIf
EndEvent
Event &CteDesCod.IsValid
Do Case Case Not &CteDesCod.IsEmpty() and &CteRecCod.IsEmpty() //destinatario e recebedor vazio (Insert) If &CteDesCod <> &OldCteDesCod //trocou o destinatario atualiza prestação &Sub = 2 Do 'GetCidade' &CteTerCidCod.SetFocus() EndIf Case &CteDesCod <> &OldCteDesCod and not &CteRecCod.IsEmpty() // trocou o destinatario e recebedor não é vazio &Sub = 2 Do 'GetCidade'
&Sub = 6 //Recebedor // então atualiza dados do destinatario mas continua prestação do recebedor Do 'GetCidade' &CteTerCidCod.SetFocus() Case not &CteRecCod.IsEmpty() // se o recebedor não for vazio If &CteRecCod <> &OldCteRecCod // e trocou recebedor atualiza prestação &Sub = 6 //Recebedor Do 'GetCidade' &CteTerCidCod.SetFocus() EndIf OtherWise &CteDesCod.SetFocus() EndCase
EndEvent
Event &CteNcmCod.IsValid
Do 'GetNBS'
EndEvent
Event &SerCteIniUfe.IsValid
&Estado = 4 Do 'CarregaCidades'
EndEvent
Event &SerCteTerUfe.IsValid
&Estado = 3 Do 'CarregaCidades'
EndEvent
Sub 'servico'
&CteTipSer.Clear() If &CteModCod = '57' &CteTipSer.AddItem(TipoServicoCte.Normal,'0-Normal') &CteTipSer.AddItem(TipoServicoCte.Subcontratacao,'1-SubContratação') &CteTipSer.AddItem(TipoServicoCte.Redespacho,'2-Redespacho') &CteTipSer.AddItem(TipoServicoCte.Multimodal,'4-Multi Modal') &CteTipSer.AddItem(TipoServicoCte.Redespachointermediario,'3-Redespacho Intermediário') TableGeneral.Visible = True TableServico.Visible = False Else &CteTipSer.AddItem(TipoServicoCte.transportePessoas,'6-Transporte de Pessoas') &CteTipSer.AddItem(TipoServicoCte.TransporteValores,'7-Transporte de Valores') &CteTipSer.AddItem(TipoServicoCte.ExcessoBagagem,'8-Excesso de Bagagem') TableGeneral.Visible = False TableServico.Visible = True Do 'GetClienteFilial' If Not &FilPesCod.IsEmpty() &Sub = 4 Do 'GetCidade' EndIf EndIf
&CteMod.Clear() &CteMod.AddItem(ModalCte.Rodoviario,'01-Rodoviário')
&CteTipSer = &auxCteTipSer
EndSub
Sub 'GetClienteFilial'
For Each Order FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod &FilPesCod = FilPesCod exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'GetCidade'
Do case Case &Sub = 1 //Remetente &PesCod = &CteRemCod Case &Sub = 2 //Destinatário &PesCod = &CteDesCod Case &Sub = 3 //Tomador &PesCod = &SerCteTomCod Case &Sub = 4 &PesCod = &FilPesCod Case &Sub = 5//Expedidor &PesCod = &CteExpCod Case &Sub = 6 //Recebedor &PesCod = &CteRecCod EndCase
For each Order EmpCod,PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &PesCod
Do case Case &Sub = 1 //REMETENTE &oldCteRemCod = PesCod &Estado = 1 &oldCteIniUfe = PesCidUfeCod &CteIniUfe = PesCidUfeCod &PesCteIniCidCod = PesCidIBGE
If PesTip = tipoPessoa.FISICA &CteRemCnpj = PesCpf Else &CteRemCnpj = PesCnpj EndIf &CteRemRaz = SubStr(PesRaz,1,35)+' '+&CteRemCnpj case &Sub = 2 //Destinatário &oldCteDesCod = PesCod &Estado = 2 &oldCteTerUfe = PesCidUfeCod &CteTerUfe = PesCidUfeCod &PesCteTerCidCod = PesCidIBGE If PesTip = tipoPessoa.FISICA &CteDesCnpj = PesCpf Else &CteDesCnpj = PesCnpj EndIf &CteDesRaz = SubStr(PesRaz,1,35)+' '+&CteDesCnpj Case &Sub = 3//Tomador &Estado = 3
&SerCteTerUfe = PesCidUfeCod &PesCteTerCidCod = PesCidIBGE If PesTip = tipoPessoa.FISICA &CteTomCnpj = PesCpf Else &CtetomCnpj = PesCnpj EndIf &SerCteTomNom = SubStr(PesRaz,1,35) +' '+&CtetomCnpj case &Sub = 4 &Estado = 4
&SerCteIniUfe = PesCidUfeCod &PesCteIniCidCod = PesCidIBGE
Case &Sub = 5 //Expedidor &Estado = 1 &oldCteExpCod = PesCod &oldCteIniUfe = PesCidUfeCod &CteIniUfe = PesCidUfeCod &PesCteIniCidCod = PesCidIBGE case &Sub = 6 //Recebedor &oldCteRecCod = PesCod &Estado = 2 &oldCteTerUfe = PesCidUfeCod &CteTerUfe = PesCidUfeCod &PesCteTerCidCod = PesCidIBGE EndCASE
Exit EndFor Do 'CarregaCidades'
EndSub
Sub 'LoadCTe'
For each order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where CteCod = &CteCod &EmpCod = EmpCod &FilCod = FilCod &CteCod = CteCod &CteNum = CteNum If CteNum <> 0 &FilCod.Enabled = false Else &FilCod.Enabled = True EndIf
&CteSer = CteSer &CteSts = CteSts &CteAutDatHorRec = CteAutDatHorRec &CteAutDigVal = CteAutDigVal &CteAutMsg = CteAutMsg &CteAutNumLot = CteAutNumLot &CteAutNumPro = CteAutNumPro &CteAutNumRec = CteAutNumRec &CteModCod = CteModCod &CteChv = CteChv
If CteModCod = '57' &CteRemCod = CteRemCod
If CteRemCnpj.Trim().IsEmpty() &CteRemCnpj = CteRemCpf Else &CteRemCnpj = CteRemCnpj EndIf &CteRemRaz = SubStr(CteRemRaz,1,35)+' '+&CteRemCnpj &CteExpCod = CteExpCod &CteExpRaz = CteExpRaz &CteRecCod = CteRecCod &CteRecRaz = CteRecRaz &CteIniUfe = CteIniUfe
&Estado = 1 Do 'CarregaCidades' &CteIniCidCod = CteIniCidCod &CteDesCod = CteDesCod
If CteDesCnpj.Trim().IsEmpty() &CteDesCnpj = CteDesCpf Else &CteDesCnpj = CteDesCnpj EndIf &CteDesRaz = SubStr(CteDesRaz,1,35)+' '+&CteDesCnpj
&CteTerUfe = CteTerUfe &Estado = 2 Do 'CarregaCidades'
&CteTerCidCod = CteTerCidCod &CteTomSer = CteTomSer &CteTomCod = CteTomCod &CteTomRaz = SubStr(CteTomRaz,1,35)
&oldCteTerUfe = CteTerUfe &oldCteIniUfe = CteIniUfe &oldCteRemCod = CteRemCod &oldCteDesCod = CteDesCod &OldCteTomCod = CteTomCod &OldCteExpCod = CteExpCod &OldCteRecCod = CteRecCod &CteTomIndAlt = CteTomIndAlt Else &SerCteTomCod = CteTomCod &SerCteTomNom = SubStr(CteTomRaz,1,35)
&SerCteIniUfe = CteIniUfe &Estado = 4 Do 'CarregaCidades' &SerCteIniCidCod = CteIniCidCod
&SerCteTerUfe = CteTerUfe &Estado = 3 Do 'CarregaCidades' &SerCteTerCidCod = CteTerCidCod EndIf
Do 'servico' &CteTipSer = CteTipSer &auxCteTipSer = CteTipSer &auxCteMod = CteMod &CteMod = CteMod &CteindGlo = CteindGlo &CteFinEms = CteFinEms &CteDtaEms = CteDtaEms &CteHorEms = CteHorEms &CteDadAdiTra = CteDadAdiTra &CteDadAdiSer = CteDadAdiSer &CteEmiFunCod = CteEmiFunCod &CteLctCod = CteLctCod &CteNcmCod = CteNcmCod
Do 'GetNBS' EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'CarregaCidades'
Do Case Case &Estado = 1 &CteIniCidCod.Clear() for &sdtDpCidade in dpCidadesDoEstado(&EmpCod,&CteIniUfe) &CteIniCidCod.AddItem(&sdtDpCidade.CidIBGE,&sdtDpCidade.CidNom) endfor
&CteIniCidCod = &PesCteIniCidCod
Case &Estado = 2 &CteTerCidCod.Clear() for &sdtDpCidade in dpCidadesDoEstado(&EmpCod,&CteTerUfe) &CteTerCidCod.AddItem(&sdtDpCidade.CidIBGE,&sdtDpCidade.CidNom) endfor
&CteTerCidCod = &PesCteTerCidCod
Case &Estado = 3 &SerCteTerCidCod.Clear() for &sdtDpCidade in dpCidadesDoEstado(&EmpCod,&SerCteTerUfe) &SerCteTerCidCod.AddItem(&sdtDpCidade.CidIBGE,&sdtDpCidade.CidNom) endfor
&SerCteTerCidCod = &PesCteTerCidCod
Case &Estado = 4 &SerCteIniCidCod.Clear() for &sdtDpCidade in dpCidadesDoEstado(&EmpCod,&SerCteIniUfe) &SerCteIniCidCod.AddItem(&sdtDpCidade.CidIBGE,&sdtDpCidade.CidNom) endfor
If &CteCod = 0 //so pra quan iniciar o cte de OS depois disso manteo o que foi slecionado &SerCteIniCidCod = &PesCteIniCidCod EndIf EndCase
EndSub
Sub 'GetTomador'
For each Order EmpCod,PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &CteTomCod &CteTomRaz = PesRaz Exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'GetRecebedor'
For each Order EmpCod,PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &CteRecCod &CteRecRaz = PesRaz Exit when none &CteRecCod = 0 &CteRecRaz = '' EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'GetExpedidor'
For each Order EmpCod,PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &CteExpCod
&CteExpRaz = PesRaz Exit when none &CteExpCod = 0 &CteExpRaz = '' EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'GetNBS'
For each order NcmCod Where NcmCod = &CteNcmCod &CteNcmDes = NcmDes Exit EndFor
EndSub
